svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="JY-1xWXuEYKjOuxmr4kB"> <mxGraphModel dx="1269" dy="658" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="ReporteContext" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="100" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- strategy: ReporteStrategy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="100" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ set_strategy(strategy)
+ ejecutar_reporte(params)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="100" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="<<interface>>
ReporteStrategy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="700" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ calcular(ventas, params): dict" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="700" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="ReporteDiarioStrategy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="540" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ calcular(ventas, params): dict
 - filtra por fecha
 - suma ingresos del dia" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="540" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="ReporteRangoStrategy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="820" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ calcular(ventas, params): dict
 - filtra por rango de fechas
 - agrupa por dia" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="820" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=15;" value="Client (reportes/views.py)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="100" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="reporte_diario()
reporte_rango()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="230" x="100" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=ERmandOne;endFill=0;startArrow=ERmanyToOne;startFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
